description_long: This marble sculpture depicts a mythological scene featuring three human figures and several aquatic creatures. The central figure is a bearded male, draped in a flowing robe, seated on a large shell with a trident or staff in hand, suggesting a representation of Neptune or Poseidon. To his right, a nude female figure kneels, offering an object, possibly a cup or shell, in a gesture of supplication or offering. At the base, a cherubic child reclines among swirling waves and sea creatures, including a large fish and a dolphin. The figures are intricately carved, with detailed musculature, hair, and drapery, all set atop a rocky, wave-like base. The entire composition exudes movement and drama, characteristic of Baroque or Neoclassical styles.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of Neptune or Poseidon with a trident, accompanied by a kneeling woman and a child among sea creatures and waves.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the male figure, the kneeling woman, and the child with sea creatures at the base.
description_view_1: Direct rear view highlighting the muscular back of the central male figure, the shell seat, and the arrangement of aquatic animals.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the faces and interaction between the male and female figures, with the child and sea creatures visible below.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the kneeling woman’s back and the dynamic arrangement of the figures and marine elements.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological figures of Neptune or Poseidon with attendants and sea creatures
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a neutral background.
